headline: Realty Income Announces Closing of $694 Million Term Loan Due 2036
summary: Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced the successful closing of a $694 million U.S. dollar-denominated, unsecured term loan (Term Loan) due January 2036 with an affiliate of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. The Term Loan priced at an all-in fixed rate of 4.91%. In conjunction with the closing, Realty Income executed a cross-currency swap for a portion of the proceeds, swapping $500 million of proceeds for approximately €431 million (in ad

headline: A Look At Apollo Global Management’s Valuation After The Realty Income Joint Venture And New UK Credit Fund
summary: How the Realty Income joint venture reshapes Apollo’s private capital profile The new joint venture with Realty Income centers on approximately 500 US single tenant retail properties on long term net leases, giving Apollo funds exposure to contractual rental cash flows backed by Realty Income’s asset management platform. Apollo Global Management (APO) is committing US$1.0b for a 49% interest in the vehicle. Realty Income retains operational control and a call option from year 7 to year 15,...

headline: W. P. Carey: Trading At A Deep Discount While The Pivot Delivers
summary: W. P. Carey maintains a strong occupancy, low dividend payout ratio, supported by a successful pivot toward industrial and retail assets. See why WPC stock is a buy.
